mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns show no statistical significance during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0%, labor market slack triggers recession fears that compress corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in over 65% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals robust consumer demand that boosts corporate revenue forecasts, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to generate a positive rank correlation with 20-day returns when either series declines, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase indicates rapid capacity utilization that supports short-term equity momentum, yielding positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns turn negative in over 60% of periods where INDPRO accelerates, or the mechanism shows zero predictive accuracy outside recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly correlates with aggregate corporate profit expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window or GDP growth fails to predict quarterly equity direction with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid acceleration in consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 20-day returns in over 70% of high-inflation months, or the inflation threshold fails to separate winning and losing periods in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and falling unemployment signals labor market tightening that supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields a negative or zero rank IC over 3-year windows, or employment/unemployment divergence fails to predict quarterly equity direction.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a supply-side contraction that forces corporate earnings downgrades, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain positive in over 65% of double-dip production periods, or the signal loses predictive power in out-of-sample validation.
